name: Smishing / Suspicious Text or Chat Message Report
description: Internal form for employees to report suspicious text messages or messaging-app pings (SMS, iMessage, WhatsApp, Teams, Slack, Signal, LinkedIn DMs) asking for information, links, money, or impersonating an executive or vendor. Severity escalates if the user clicked, replied, or sent something.
title: Report a Suspicious Text or Chat Message
intro: Got a text or chat message that feels off? Someone claiming to be your CEO asking for help 'real quick,' a delivery service link, a bank fraud alert, a recruiter with a too-good offer, a WhatsApp from an unknown number that knew your name? Send it to us. Reporting takes a couple of minutes and helps us protect everyone else. Don't worry if you replied or clicked — just tell us what happened.
submit_message: Thanks — your report is in the queue. If you clicked, replied, or sent anything, an analyst will follow up shortly. Otherwise, we'll review and watch for the same pattern hitting others.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: So we can follow up if we need more details.

fields.label: Where did the message come in?
Sender's number, email, or handle
fields.help: The phone number, email, or username it came from. Include country code if you have it. 'Unknown' is also useful.

fields.label: Who did the sender claim to be?
fields.help: If they identified themselves — name, role, or company.
fields.sample_value: Marcus Webb, our CEO — message said 'It's Marcus, I got a new number, save it.'

fields.label: What were they asking for?
options: Move the conversation off-platform (to WhatsApp, personal email, etc.)
Confirm I'm available / build rapport before asking
Reply with a code I just received
sample_value: Confirm I'm available / build rapport before asking

fields.label: Was there a link in the message?
fields.help: Paste the link here if there was one. Don't click it. If it's long, just paste what you can.

fields.label: Did you reply, click, or send anything?
fields.help: Be honest — knowing the truth lets us help. You're not in trouble.
options: No, I ignored it / deleted it
I replied but gave them nothing
I clicked the link but didn't enter anything
I clicked the link and a page loaded — not sure if I entered info
I shared an MFA / verification code
I shared credentials or account info
I sent money, gift cards, or crypto
I bought something they asked me to
fields.sample_value: I replied but gave them nothing

fields.label: When did the message come in?
Paste the message text (or describe it)
fields.help: Copy the message exactly if you can — punctuation, emojis, and odd phrasing matter for pattern matching. A screenshot below is great too.
fields.sample_value: Hey Sam, this is Marcus. I got a new number, save it. Are you free for a quick favor? I'm in a board meeting and can't talk but I need you to help me with something quickly. Let me know.

fields.label: Screenshot of the message (optional)
fields.help: A screenshot helps us see formatting and any preview cards. Crop out personal info if you want.

alert_template.title: Smishing / suspicious message reported by {{reporter_email}}
